rationale: Keep: the citing paper explicitly frames its contribution in word-of-mouth retransmission and motivational drivers of retelling valence (e.g., persuasion/guidance motives and negativity shifts), while the cited paper is a stage-based WOM theory paper on generation vs. transmission and motive-driven valence patterns (self-enhancement). Given this strong construct overlap, the citation is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention (and the DOI match is exact).
